issues.message: Voice pairs share one attack clock for 100% of their time (V0-V1 1.00): counter-lines are harmonizing rather than moving in independent rhythmic strata. Deliberate in homophony/chorale textures; in counterpoint, put the countersubject at a different rate (double-speed cells or augmentation) attacking in the other voice's gaps.
